title: Capture The Dragon Egg
description: Compete against your friends to capture the dragon egg and get timely rewards!
body:
![CTDE Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CTDE/BH_NU_HEADER.png)
![CTDE Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CTDE/BH_NU_BANNER1.png)

**Win the dragon egg!**

Holders can get recurring potion and item rewards while the egg is in their inventory.
Other players can track the egg holder to reap its rewards!

![CTDE Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CTDE/BH_NU_BANNER2.png)

The mod is completely customizable from the item rewards, amounts, durations, and vanilla potion effects with the use of commands.

**You must be an operator and in creative mode to use any commands.**

Up to 3 items and potion effects can be submitted.

Make the egg holder glow and display an actionbar with the egg holder's name and coordinates display in real time!
All features, potions, and rewards can be toggled off and on. Rewards and potions can be customized!
Vanilla potion support for potions and modded item support for items.

Egg holders are prohibited from throwing or placing the dragon egg.

![CTDE Commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CTDE/BH_NU_BANNER4.png)

Disable or enable the mod: /dragonegg toggle active

View current rewards and settings: /dragonegg list

Add an item reward: /dragonegg set potion <index> <effect>

Add a potion reward: /dragonegg set reward <index> <item ID> <amount> <duration in ticks>

Remove a potion reward: /dragonegg remove <index> <potion/reward>

Toggle egg holder glow: /dragonegg toggle glow

Toggle egg holder actionbar: /dragonegg toggle actionbar

Toggle whether rewards are given: /dragonegg toggle rewards

Toggle whether potions are applied: /dragonegg toggle potions

Turn on the actionbar for yourself: /dragonegg actionbar (Hotkey: V by default)

![Bisect Hosting Promo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CTDE/BH_NU_PROMO.png)
[https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector](https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector)
